name: Hustronix Daily Research Pipeline
description: Daily: research + 3 short LinkedIn options to Slack. User approves with approve 1|2|3. Repo: hustronix35-prog/marketing-os

prompts.text:
You are running the Hustronix Marketing OS daily pipeline in repo hustronix35-prog/marketing-os on branch master.

Read .cursor/rules/hustronix-brand.mdc and skills in .cursor/skills/

1. Ingest + research + strategist (ensure 3+ pending ideas)
2. Run: python scripts/run_daily_pipeline.py
3. Send to Slack #marketing-os: one-line KPIs + post_options.slack_message (3 SHORT options)
4. User replies approve 1|2|3 — handled by separate automation

Rules: short posts only, no AI hype, never publish without Slack approval.

Primary: run run_daily_pipeline.py then post slack_message to Slack.
